care.summary: A bold tropical plant with broad, oval leaves patterned in cream, white, and green variegation.
care.light: Bright to medium indirect light; too much direct sun scorches leaves
care.water: Keep soil evenly moist; water when top inch dries. Reduce in winter
care.soil: Well-draining potting mix with peat and perlite
care.humidity: Moderate to high; benefits from regular misting
care.fertilizer: Dilute balanced fertilizer every 4-6 weeks spring through summer
care.toxicity: Highly toxic if ingested; causes mouth and throat swelling. Keep away from pets and children
common_issues: Brown leaf edges from tap water chemicals or low humidity
Leggy, bare stem from insufficient light
Yellow lower leaves — natural aging or overwatering
Drooping from underwatering or cold exposure
tips: Always use gloves when pruning — sap can irritate skin
Rotate the plant weekly for even growth
Remove yellow lower leaves to encourage new top growth
Keep away from drafts and air conditioning vents
